1876	    have happ : (HomologicalComplex.Hom.isoApp coreIso 0).hom = (coreIso_objIso 𝒰 F 0 V).hom :=
1877	      congrArg Iso.hom (HomologicalComplex.Hom.isoOfComponents_app _ _ 0)
1878	    rw [happ, sectionCechAugV]
1879	    exact (Category.id_comp _).symm
1880	  -- Peel the augmentation node off `D` with `mapHC_augment_iso` (twice), then glue the
1881	  -- non-augmented `coreIso` to the augmentation data with `augmentCochainIso`.
1882	  exact (GV.mapHomologicalComplex cc).mapIso
1883	      (mapHC_augment_iso (SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf ⋙
1884	          PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars α) hΨadd (cechComplexOnX 𝒰 F) (cechAugmentation 𝒰 F)
1885	        (cechAugmentation_comp_d 𝒰 F)) ≪≫
1886	    mapHC_augment_iso GV ‹GV.Additive› (((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf ⋙
1887	        PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars α).mapHomologicalComplex cc).obj (cechComplexOnX 𝒰 F))
1888	      ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf ⋙
1889	        PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars α).map (cechAugmentation 𝒰 F))
1890	      (map_augment_cond (SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf ⋙
1891	        PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars α) hΨadd (cechComplexOnX 𝒰 F) (cechAugmentation 𝒰 F)
1892	        (cechAugmentation_comp_d 𝒰 F)) ≪≫
1893	    augmentCochainIso coreIso eY (GV.map ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf ⋙
1894	        PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars α).map (cechAugmentation 𝒰 F)))
1895	      (map_augment_cond GV ‹GV.Additive› (((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf ⋙
1896	          PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars α).mapHomologicalComplex cc).obj (cechComplexOnX 𝒰 F))
1897	        ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf ⋙
1898	          PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars α).map (cechAugmentation 𝒰 F))
1899	        (map_augment_cond (SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf ⋙
1900	          PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars α) hΨadd (cechComplexOnX 𝒰 F) (cechAugmentation 𝒰 F)
1901	          (cechAugmentation_comp_d 𝒰 F))) (sectionCechAugV 𝒰 F V)
1902	      (sectionCechAugV_comp_d 𝒰 F V) hcompat
1903	
1904	/-! ## Stub 6 — Contracting homotopy on the augmented concrete section Čech complex -/
1905	
1906	/-! ### Engine instantiation for Stub 6.
1907	
1908	The dependent-coefficient combinatorial Čech engine (`CombinatorialCech.depHomotopy_spec`,
1909	CechAcyclic.lean) is instantiated with the augmentation node `Γ(V, F)` as level `0` and the
1910	restricted Čech coefficients `Γ(⨅ₖ (U_{σ k} ⊓ V), F)` as levels `≥ 1`.  The coface maps `δ`
1911	are the presheaf face restrictions (level `0 → 1` is the augmentation restriction), and the
1912	prepend maps `c` are genuine restrictions because `V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 i_fix` forces
1913	`U'_{i_fix·σ} = U'_σ`.  The `hu`/`hsh` compatibilities collapse to "two parallel restriction
1914	chains between the same opens agree". -/
1915	
1916	section Stub6Engine
1917	
1918	variable (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) (F : X.Modules) (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens X)
1919	
1920	/-- Composite of two presheaf restrictions is the direct restriction (local copy of the
1921	`CechBridge` private helper `restr_trans`). -/
1922	private lemma stubRestrTrans (P : (TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X)ᵒᵖ ⥤ Ab.{u})
1923	    {A B C : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X} (h1 : A ≤ B) (h2 : B ≤ C)
1924	    (x : ToType (P.obj (Opposite.op C))) :
1925	    ConcreteCategory.hom (P.map (homOfLE h1).op)
1926	        (ConcreteCategory.hom (P.map (homOfLE h2).op) x)
1927	      = ConcreteCategory.hom (P.map (homOfLE (h1.trans h2)).op) x := by
1928	  rw [← ConcreteCategory.comp_apply, ← P.map_comp, ← op_comp]
1929	  rfl
1930	
1931	/-- Two parallel presheaf restrictions agree (poset-hom uniqueness; local copy of the
1932	`CechBridge` private helper `restr_op_unique`). -/
1933	private lemma stubRestrUnique (P : (TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X)ᵒᵖ ⥤ Ab.{u})
1934	    {A C : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X} (f g : Opposite.op C ⟶ Opposite.op A)
1935	    (x : ToType (P.obj (Opposite.op C))) :
1936	    ConcreteCategory.hom (P.map f) x = ConcreteCategory.hom (P.map g) x := by
1937	  rw [show f = g from Quiver.Hom.unop_inj (Subsingleton.elim _ _)]
1938	
1939	/-- A nonempty restricted Čech intersection is contained in `V`. -/
1940	private lemma stubInterLeV {m : ℕ} (σ : Fin (m + 1) → 𝒰.I₀) :
1941	    (⨅ k, (coverOpen 𝒰 (σ k) ⊓ V)) ≤ V :=
1942	  le_trans (iInf_le _ 0) inf_le_right
1943	
1944	/-- Prepending `i_fix` does not shrink the restricted intersection (positive levels). -/
1945	private lemma stubConsLe {m : ℕ} (i_fix : 𝒰.I₀) (hiV : V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 i_fix)
1946	    (σ : Fin (m + 1) → 𝒰.I₀) :
1947	    (⨅ k, (coverOpen 𝒰 (σ k) ⊓ V)) ≤
1948	      ⨅ k, (coverOpen 𝒰 ((Fin.cons i_fix σ : Fin (m + 2) → 𝒰.I₀) k) ⊓ V) := by
1949	  refine le_iInf fun k => ?_
1950	  refine Fin.cases ?_ ?_ k
1951	  · rw [Fin.cons_zero]
1952	    exact le_trans (stubInterLeV 𝒰 V σ) (le_inf hiV le_rfl)
1953	  · intro j
1954	    rw [Fin.cons_succ]
1955	    exact iInf_le _ j
1956	
1957	/-- Prepending `i_fix` to the empty tuple yields an intersection containing `V`
1958	(the augmentation node case). -/
1959	private lemma stubConsLeZero (i_fix : 𝒰.I₀) (hiV : V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 i_fix)
1960	    (σ : Fin 0 → 𝒰.I₀) :
1961	    V ≤ ⨅ k, (coverOpen 𝒰 ((Fin.cons i_fix σ : Fin 1 → 𝒰.I₀) k) ⊓ V) := by
1962	  refine le_iInf fun k => ?_
1963	  rw [Fin.fin_one_eq_zero k, Fin.cons_zero]
1964	  exact le_inf hiV le_rfl
1965	
1966	/-- The open underlying the level-`m` Stub-6 coefficient: level `0` is `V` (the
1967	augmentation node), level `m+1` is the restricted intersection `⨅ₖ (U_{σ k} ⊓ V)`. -/
1968	private def stubOpen : (m : ℕ) → (Fin m → 𝒰.I₀) → TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X
1969	  | 0, _ => V
1970	  | _ + 1, σ => ⨅ k, (coverOpen 𝒰 (σ k) ⊓ V)
1971	
1972	/-- The coface inclusion of the Stub-6 opens. -/
1973	private lemma stubOpen_le_coface : ∀ {m : ℕ} (σ : Fin (m + 1) → 𝒰.I₀) (j : Fin (m + 1)),
1974	    stubOpen 𝒰 V (m + 1) σ ≤ stubOpen 𝒰 V m (σ ∘ j.succAbove)
1975	  | 0, σ, _ => stubInterLeV 𝒰 V σ
1976	  | _ + 1, σ, j => le_iInf fun l => iInf_le _ (j.succAbove l)
1977	
1978	/-- The prepend inclusion of the Stub-6 opens (prepending `i_fix` does not shrink the
1979	open, because `V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 i_fix`). -/
1980	private lemma stubOpen_le_prepend (i_fix : 𝒰.I₀) (hiV : V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 i_fix) :
1981	    ∀ {m : ℕ} (σ : Fin m → 𝒰.I₀),
1982	      stubOpen 𝒰 V m σ ≤ stubOpen 𝒰 V (m + 1) (Fin.cons i_fix σ)
1983	  | 0, σ => stubConsLeZero 𝒰 V i_fix hiV σ
1984	  | _ + 1, σ => stubConsLe 𝒰 V i_fix hiV σ
1985	
1986	/-- Dependent coefficient family for the Stub-6 engine: the sections of `F` over
1987	`stubOpen m σ`.  Kept as a reducible abbreviation so the `AddCommGroup` instance is the
1988	generic one on `Ab`-objects (no bespoke match-instance). -/
1989	private noncomputable abbrev cechSectionCoeff (m : ℕ) (σ : Fin m → 𝒰.I₀) : Type u :=
1990	  ToType (((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F).presheaf.obj
1991	    (Opposite.op (stubOpen 𝒰 V m σ)))
1992	
1993	/-- The engine coface maps: presheaf face restrictions (level `0 → 1` is the augmentation
1994	restriction `Γ(V) → Γ(U'_σ)`). -/
1995	private noncomputable def cechSectionCoface (m : ℕ) (σ : Fin (m + 1) → 𝒰.I₀)
1996	    (j : Fin (m + 1)) :
1997	    cechSectionCoeff 𝒰 F V m (σ ∘ j.succAbove) →+ cechSectionCoeff 𝒰 F V (m + 1) σ :=
1998	  ConcreteCategory.hom (((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F).presheaf.map
1999	    (homOfLE (stubOpen_le_coface 𝒰 V σ j)).op)
2000	
2001	/-- The engine prepend maps: genuine restrictions (level `1 → 0` is the restriction
2002	`Γ(U'_{(i_fix)}) → Γ(V)` along `V ≤ U'_{i_fix}`). -/
2003	private noncomputable def cechSectionPrepend (i_fix : 𝒰.I₀)
2004	    (hiV : V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 i_fix) (m : ℕ) (σ : Fin m → 𝒰.I₀) :
2005	    cechSectionCoeff 𝒰 F V (m + 1) (Fin.cons i_fix σ) →+ cechSectionCoeff 𝒰 F V m σ :=
2006	  ConcreteCategory.hom (((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F).presheaf.map
2007	    (homOfLE (stubOpen_le_prepend 𝒰 V i_fix hiV σ)).op)
2008	
2009	/-- Transport of a Čech coefficient along an equality of index tuples is the canonical
2010	restriction between the (equal) intersection opens. -/
2011	private lemma cechSectionCoeff_transport {m : ℕ} {τ₁ τ₂ : Fin (m + 1) → 𝒰.I₀}
2012	    (h : τ₁ = τ₂)
2013	    (hle : stubOpen 𝒰 V (m + 1) τ₂ ≤ stubOpen 𝒰 V (m + 1) τ₁)
2014	    (y : cechSectionCoeff 𝒰 F V (m + 1) τ₁) :
2015	    (h ▸ y : cechSectionCoeff 𝒰 F V (m + 1) τ₂)
2016	      = ConcreteCategory.hom
2017	          (((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F).presheaf.map (homOfLE hle).op)
2018	          y := by
2019	  subst h
2020	  rw [show homOfLE hle = 𝟙 _ from Subsingleton.elim _ _, op_id,
2021	    CategoryTheory.Functor.map_id]
2022	  rfl
2023	
2024	/-- Unit compatibility `hu` for the Stub-6 engine: deleting the prepended `i_fix` and then
2025	applying the prepend restriction is the identity transport (both sides are restriction
2026	chains between the same opens). -/
2027	private lemma cechSection_hu (i_fix : 𝒰.I₀) (hiV : V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 i_fix)
2028	    {m : ℕ} (σ : Fin (m + 1) → 𝒰.I₀)
2029	    (y : cechSectionCoeff 𝒰 F V (m + 1)
2030	      ((Fin.cons i_fix σ : Fin (m + 2) → 𝒰.I₀) ∘ (0 : Fin (m + 2)).succAbove)) :
2031	    cechSectionPrepend 𝒰 F V i_fix hiV (m + 1) σ
2032	        (cechSectionCoface 𝒰 F V (m + 1) (Fin.cons i_fix σ) 0 y)
2033	      = (CombinatorialCech.cons_comp_zero_succAbove i_fix σ) ▸ y := by
2034	  rw [cechSectionCoeff_transport 𝒰 F V (CombinatorialCech.cons_comp_zero_succAbove i_fix σ)
2035	    (le_of_eq (by rw [CombinatorialCech.cons_comp_zero_succAbove i_fix σ]))]
2036	  exact (stubRestrTrans _ _ _ y).trans (stubRestrUnique _ _ _ y)
2037	
2038	/-- Shift compatibility `hsh` for the Stub-6 engine: prepend commutes with the later
2039	cofaces (both sides are restriction chains between the same opens). -/
2040	private lemma cechSection_hsh (i_fix : 𝒰.I₀) (hiV : V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 i_fix)
2041	    {m : ℕ} (σ : Fin (m + 1) → 𝒰.I₀) (k : Fin (m + 1))
2042	    (y : cechSectionCoeff 𝒰 F V (m + 1)
2043	      ((Fin.cons i_fix σ : Fin (m + 2) → 𝒰.I₀) ∘ (k.succ).succAbove)) :
2044	    cechSectionPrepend 𝒰 F V i_fix hiV (m + 1) σ
2045	        (cechSectionCoface 𝒰 F V (m + 1) (Fin.cons i_fix σ) k.succ y)
2046	      = cechSectionCoface 𝒰 F V m σ k
2047	          (cechSectionPrepend 𝒰 F V i_fix hiV m (σ ∘ k.succAbove)
2048	            ((CombinatorialCech.cons_comp_succAbove_succ i_fix σ k) ▸ y)) := by
2049	  have hle : stubOpen 𝒰 V (m + 1) (Fin.cons i_fix (σ ∘ k.succAbove)) ≤
2050	      stubOpen 𝒰 V (m + 1) ((Fin.cons i_fix σ : Fin (m + 2) → 𝒰.I₀) ∘ (k.succ).succAbove) :=
2051	    le_of_eq (by rw [CombinatorialCech.cons_comp_succAbove_succ i_fix σ k])
2052	  rw [cechSectionCoeff_transport 𝒰 F V
2053	    (CombinatorialCech.cons_comp_succAbove_succ i_fix σ k) hle]
2054	  refine Eq.trans (stubRestrTrans _ (stubOpen_le_prepend 𝒰 V i_fix hiV σ)
2055	    (stubOpen_le_coface 𝒰 V (Fin.cons i_fix σ) k.succ) y) ?_
2056	  refine Eq.trans (stubRestrUnique _ _ (homOfLE ((stubOpen_le_coface 𝒰 V σ k).trans
2057	    ((stubOpen_le_prepend 𝒰 V i_fix hiV (σ ∘ k.succAbove)).trans hle))).op y) ?_
2058	  refine Eq.symm ?_
2059	  refine Eq.trans (DFunLike.congr_arg (cechSectionCoface 𝒰 F V m σ k)
2060	    (stubRestrTrans _ (stubOpen_le_prepend 𝒰 V i_fix hiV (σ ∘ k.succAbove)) hle y)) ?_
2061	  exact stubRestrTrans _ (stubOpen_le_coface 𝒰 V σ k)
2062	    ((stubOpen_le_prepend 𝒰 V i_fix hiV (σ ∘ k.succAbove)).trans hle) y
2063	
2064	end Stub6Engine
2065	
2066	set_option maxHeartbeats 1600000 in
2067	/-- **Coordinatewise identification of the canonical augmentation** (the degree-`0`
2068	augmentation seam of `lem:cechSection_contractible`): the `σ`-coordinate of
2069	`sectionCechAugV` is the plain restriction `Γ(V, F) → Γ(U'_σ, F)`.  This is the `p = 0`
2070	leg unwinding of `coreIso_objIso` — through `pushPull_sigma_iso`'s `σ`-leg, the terminal
2071	object of `Over X` (which collapses `a₀(σ) ≫ (augmentation)` to the canonical map
2072	`Over.mk j_σ ⟶ Over.mk (𝟙 X)` with NO unwinding of `a₀`), and the section computation of
2073	the push–pull adjunction unit. -/
2074	lemma sectionCechAugV_π (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) [Finite 𝒰.I₀] (F : X.Modules)
2075	    (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens X) (σ : Fin 1 → 𝒰.I₀) :
2076	    sectionCechAugV 𝒰 F V ≫ Pi.π (fun τ : Fin 1 → 𝒰.I₀ =>
2077	        ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F).presheaf.obj
2078	          (Opposite.op (⨅ l, (coverOpen 𝒰 (τ l) ⊓ V)))) σ =
2079	      ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F).presheaf.map
2080	        (homOfLE (stubInterLeV 𝒰 V σ)).op := by
2081	  sorry
2082	
2083	section Stub6Homotopy
2084	
2085	variable (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) [Finite 𝒰.I₀] (F : X.Modules) (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens X)
2086	variable (i_fix : 𝒰.I₀) (hiV : V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 i_fix)
2087	
2088	/-- The augmented concrete section Čech complex of Stub 5/6, as a reducible abbreviation. -/
2089	private noncomputable abbrev cechSectionAugComplex : CochainComplex Ab.{u} ℕ :=
2090	  (sectionCechComplexV 𝒰 F V).augment (sectionCechAugV 𝒰 F V) (sectionCechAugV_comp_d 𝒰 F V)
2091	
2092	/-- The bottom homotopy component `Č⁰ ⟶ Γ(V, F)`: project onto the `i_fix`-coordinate and
2093	restrict along `V ≤ U'_{i_fix}` (the `π_{i_fix}` of the Stacks projection homotopy). -/
2094	private noncomputable def cechSectionHomotopyZero :
2095	    (cechSectionAugComplex 𝒰 F V).X 1 ⟶ (cechSectionAugComplex 𝒰 F V).X 0 :=
2096	  Pi.π (fun τ : Fin 1 → 𝒰.I₀ =>
2097	      ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F).presheaf.obj
2098	        (Opposite.op (⨅ l, (coverOpen 𝒰 (τ l) ⊓ V)))) (Fin.cons i_fix Fin.elim0) ≫
2099	    ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F).presheaf.map
2100	      (homOfLE (stubOpen_le_prepend 𝒰 V i_fix hiV Fin.elim0)).op
2101	
2102	/-- The Čech-degree homotopy components `Čᵐ⁺¹ ⟶ Čᵐ`: prepend `i_fix` to the multi-index
2103	and restrict (the identity on coefficients, since prepending does not shrink the open). -/
2104	private noncomputable def cechSectionHomotopyComp (m : ℕ) :
2105	    (cechSectionAugComplex 𝒰 F V).X (m + 2) ⟶ (cechSectionAugComplex 𝒰 F V).X (m + 1) :=
2106	  Pi.lift fun τ : Fin (m + 1) → 𝒰.I₀ =>
2107	    Pi.π (fun ρ : Fin (m + 2) → 𝒰.I₀ =>
2108	        ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F).presheaf.obj
2109	          (Opposite.op (⨅ l, (coverOpen 𝒰 (ρ l) ⊓ V)))) (Fin.cons i_fix τ) ≫
2110	      ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F).presheaf.map
2111	        (homOfLE (stubOpen_le_prepend 𝒰 V i_fix hiV τ)).op
2112	
2113	/-- Coordinatewise value of the homotopy component: the `τ`-coordinate of `h(t)` is the
2114	engine prepend map applied to the `(i_fix :: τ)`-coordinate of `t`. -/
2115	private lemma cechSectionHomotopyComp_coord (m : ℕ)
2116	    (t : ToType ((sectionCechComplexV 𝒰 F V).X (m + 1))) (τ : Fin (m + 1) → 𝒰.I₀) :
2117	    sectionCechProductEquiv (fun a => coverOpen 𝒰 a ⊓ V)
2118	        ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F) m
2119	        (ConcreteCategory.hom (cechSectionHomotopyComp 𝒰 F V i_fix hiV m) t) τ
2120	      = cechSectionPrepend 𝒰 F V i_fix hiV (m + 1) τ
2121	          (sectionCechProductEquiv (fun a => coverOpen 𝒰 a ⊓ V)
2122	            ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F) (m + 1) t (Fin.cons i_fix τ)) := by
2123	  refine Eq.trans (sectionCechProductEquiv_apply (fun a => coverOpen 𝒰 a ⊓ V)
2124	    ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F) m _ τ) ?_
2125	  refine Eq.trans (ConcreteCategory.comp_apply
2126	    (cechSectionHomotopyComp 𝒰 F V i_fix hiV m) (Pi.π _ τ) t).symm ?_
2127	  refine Eq.trans (ConcreteCategory.congr_hom (Pi.lift_π _ τ) t) ?_
2128	  refine Eq.trans (ConcreteCategory.comp_apply _ _ t) ?_
2129	  exact DFunLike.congr_arg (cechSectionPrepend 𝒰 F V i_fix hiV (m + 1) τ)
2130	    (sectionCechProductEquiv_apply (fun a => coverOpen 𝒰 a ⊓ V)
2131	      ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F) (m + 1) t (Fin.cons i_fix τ)).symm
2132	
2133	/-- Coordinatewise value of the section Čech differential: the engine `depDiff`. -/
2134	private lemma cechSectionD_coord (m : ℕ)
2135	    (t : ToType ((sectionCechComplexV 𝒰 F V).X m)) (σ : Fin (m + 2) → 𝒰.I₀) :
2136	    sectionCechProductEquiv (fun a => coverOpen 𝒰 a ⊓ V)
2137	        ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F) (m + 1)
2138	        (ConcreteCategory.hom ((sectionCechComplexV 𝒰 F V).d m (m + 1)) t) σ
2139	      = CombinatorialCech.depDiff (A := cechSectionCoeff 𝒰 F V) (cechSectionCoface 𝒰 F V)
2140	          (fun τ => sectionCechProductEquiv (fun a => coverOpen 𝒰 a ⊓ V)
2141	            ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F) m t τ) σ := by
2142	  have hd : (sectionCechComplexV 𝒰 F V).d m (m + 1) =
2143	      AlgebraicTopology.AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.objD
2144	        (sectionCechCosimplicial (fun a => coverOpen 𝒰 a ⊓ V)
2145	          ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F)) m :=
2146	    CochainComplex.of_d _ _ (AlgebraicTopology.AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.d_squared _) m
2147	  refine Eq.trans (congrArg (fun y => sectionCechProductEquiv (fun a => coverOpen 𝒰 a ⊓ V)
2148	    ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F) (m + 1) y σ)
2149	    (ConcreteCategory.congr_hom hd t)) ?_
2150	  refine Eq.trans (sectionCech_objD_apply (fun a => coverOpen 𝒰 a ⊓ V)
2151	    ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F) m t σ) ?_
2152	  exact Finset.sum_congr rfl fun j _ => rfl
2153	
2154	/-- The `m = 0` engine differential is the single augmentation restriction. -/
2155	private lemma cechSectionDepDiff_zero
2156	    (u : ∀ ρ : Fin 0 → 𝒰.I₀, cechSectionCoeff 𝒰 F V 0 ρ) (σ : Fin 1 → 𝒰.I₀) :
2157	    CombinatorialCech.depDiff (A := cechSectionCoeff 𝒰 F V) (cechSectionCoface 𝒰 F V) u σ
2158	      = cechSectionCoface 𝒰 F V 0 σ 0 (u (σ ∘ (0 : Fin 1).succAbove)) := by
2159	  simp only [CombinatorialCech.depDiff]

2401	/- Planner strategy:
2402	Goal: `Homotopy (𝟙 ((sectionCechComplexV 𝒰 F V).augment ε hε)) 0`
2403	assuming `V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 i_fix`, where
2404	  `sectionCechComplexV 𝒰 F V = sectionCechComplex (fun i : 𝒰.I₀ => coverOpen 𝒰 i ⊓ V) Fp`
2405	is the non-augmented complex and `ε`, `hε` are the augmentation data.
2406	
2407	This is PURELY COMBINATORIAL — no affine vanishing, no qcoh, no tilde.
2408	
2409	Route:
2410	
2411	(A) IDENTIFY THE FAMILY: `U'_σ := coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ ⊓ V = ⨅ k, (coverOpen 𝒰 (σ k) ⊓ V)`.
2412	    `D'` is the alternating coface complex of the cosimplicial object
2413	    `sectionCechCosimplicial (fun i => coverOpen 𝒰 i ⊓ V) Fp`.
2414	
2415	(B) MAXIMUM PROPERTY: Since `V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 i_fix`, we have
2416	    `coverOpen 𝒰 i_fix ⊓ V = V`. Therefore `U'_{i_fix..σ} = U'_σ` for any `σ`
2417	    (prepending `i_fix` does not shrink the open). Equivalently, the prepend map
2418	    `σ ↦ Fin.cons i_fix σ` is the IDENTITY at the coefficient level:
2419	    for each multi-index `σ : Fin m → 𝒰.I₀`:
2420	      `⨅ k, (coverOpen 𝒰 (Fin.cons i_fix σ k) ⊓ V) = ⨅ k, (coverOpen 𝒰 (σ k) ⊓ V)`.
2421	    This is because the `k=0` factor is `coverOpen 𝒰 i_fix ⊓ V = V`, which is ≥ every
2422	    other factor (since `U'_j = coverOpen 𝒰 j ⊓ V ≤ V`); hence the iInf is unchanged.
2423	
2424	(C) INSTANTIATE THE DEPENDENT ENGINE: Set
2425	    `A m σ := Fp.presheaf.obj (op (⨅ k, (coverOpen 𝒰 (σ k) ⊓ V)))`
2426	    `δ m σ j := F.presheaf.map (homOfLE (le_iInf ...)).op`  (face restriction)
2427	    `c m σ := 𝟙` (or the identity map via the equality from (B))
2428	    Then the Dependent engine hypotheses hold:
2429	    * `hu`: unit identity `c ∘ δ₀ = id` — follows from (B) (prepending `i_fix` at position 0
2430	      recovers the same open, so the restriction is the identity).
2431	    * `hsh`: shift identity `c ∘ δ_{k+1} = δ_k ∘ c` — follows from `cons_comp_succAbove_succ`.

47	/-- **A faithful functor that preserves zero morphisms reflects the zero object.**
48	If `F` is faithful and preserves zero morphisms and `F.obj X` is a zero object, then
49	`X` is a zero object. (Three-line proof off `IsZero.iff_id_eq_zero` +

52	lemma isZero_of_faithful_preservesZeroMorphisms
53	    {C D : Type*} [Category C] [Category D] [HasZeroMorphisms C] [HasZeroMorphisms D]
54	    (F : C ⥤ D) [F.PreservesZeroMorphisms] [F.Faithful] {Y : C}
55	    (h : IsZero (F.obj Y)) : IsZero Y := by
56	  rw [IsZero.iff_id_eq_zero] at h ⊢
57	  apply F.map_injective
58	  rw [F.map_id, F.map_zero]
59	  exact h
60	
61	/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — a null-homotopic identity kills homology -/
62	
63	/-- **A complex homotopy-equivalent to zero has vanishing homology.**
64	If the identity of a homological complex `D` is homotopic to the zero map
65	(`Homotopy (𝟙 D) 0`), then every homology object `D.homology p` is a zero object.
66	This is the categorical packaging of the contracting-homotopy criterion: the
67	prepend-`i_fix` homotopy on the section {\v C}ech complex produces exactly such a
68	`Homotopy (𝟙 D) 0`, and this lemma converts it into the required
69	`IsZero (D.homology p)`.
70	
71	The proof is the standard three-lemma combo: homotopy-invariance of the induced
72	homology map (`Homotopy.homologyMap_eq`), the identity/zero computations
73	(`homologyMap_id`, `homologyMap_zero`), and the "identity equals zero" criterion for a
74	zero object (`IsZero.iff_id_eq_zero`).  Project-local Mathlib supplement (homological

78	    [D.HasHomology p] (ho : Homotopy (𝟙 D) 0) : IsZero (D.homology p) := by
79	  refine (IsZero.iff_id_eq_zero _).mpr ?_

content:
The degree-`p` term of the evaluated non-augmented backbone complex
`Γ(V, Ψ(pushPullObj F Y_p))` is isomorphic, as an abelian group, to the degree-`p` term
`∏_σ Γ(⨅ₖ(coverOpen 𝒰 (σ k) ⊓ V), F)` of the concrete restricted section Čech complex.
This is `pushPull_eval_prod_iso` (Stub 4) post-composed with the factorwise reindexing along
`coverInterOpen_inf_eq_iInf_inf`. -/
noncomputable def coreIso_objIso (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) [Finite 𝒰.I₀]
    (F : X.Modules) (p : ℕ) (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens X) :
    ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj
          (pushPullObj F
            ((coverCechNerveOver 𝒰).obj (Opposite.op (SimplexCategory.mk p))))).presheaf.obj
        (Opposite.op V) ≅
      (sectionCechComplexV 𝒰 F V).X p :=
  pushPull_eval_prod_iso 𝒰 F p V ≪≫
    Limits.Pi.mapIso (fun σ : Fin (p + 1) → 𝒰.I₀ =>
      eqToIso (congrArg
        (fun W => ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op W))
        (coverInterOpen_inf_eq_iInf_inf 𝒰 σ V)))


end AlgebraicGeometry

/-
Copyright (c) 2026 Christian Merten. All rights reserved.
Released under Apache 2.0 license as described in the file LICENSE.
Authors: Christian Merten

import AlgebraicJacobian.Cohomology.CechSectionIdentificationBase

/-!
# Sub-brick A — Leg: the `coreIso_comm` chain

The `coreIso_comm` chain (`abHom_finsetSum_apply`, `coreIso_comm_leg`, `coreIso_comm_coface`,
`coreIso_comm_sum`, `coreIso_comm`) expressing naturality of the degreewise section iso
through the Čech differentials. Depends on `CechSectionIdentificationBase`.

Carries the residual sorry `coreIso_comm_leg`.
-/

universe u

open CategoryTheory Limits Opposite

namespace AlgebraicGeometry

open Scheme.Modules

variable {X : Scheme.{u}}

/-! ### The `coreIso_comm` chain (`lem:coreIso_comm_leg` → `lem:coreIso_comm_coface` →
`lem:coreIso_comm_sum` → `lem:coreIso_comm`), built bottom-up per the iter-072 effort-break. -/

/-- Application of a finite sum of `Ab`-morphisms distributes over the sum.  (Local copy of
the `CechAcyclic` private helper `ab_hom_finsetSum_apply`.) -/
private lemma abHom_finsetSum_apply {A B : Ab.{u}} {κ : Type*}
    (s : Finset κ) (f : κ → (A ⟶ B)) (t : ToType A) :
    ConcreteCategory.hom (∑ i ∈ s, f i) t = ∑ i ∈ s, ConcreteCategory.hom (f i) t := by

/-

Released under Apache 2.0 license as described in the file LICENSE.
Authors: Christian Merten

import AlgebraicJacobian.Cohomology.CechSectionIdentificationLeg

/-!
# Sub-brick A — Rest: section identification, augmentation, contractibility

The section/augmentation + contractibility block:
`sectionCechAugV`, `sectionCechAugV_comp_d`, `cechSection_complex_iso`,
the `stub*`/`cechSection*` private engine, `sectionCechAugV_π` (sorry),
the Stub6 homotopy engine, and `cechSection_contractible`.
Depends on `CechSectionIdentificationLeg` (transitively Base).

Carries the residual sorry `sectionCechAugV_π`.
-/

universe u

open CategoryTheory Limits Opposite

namespace AlgebraicGeometry

open Scheme.Modules

variable {X : Scheme.{u}}

/-- **Canonical augmentation of the concrete section Čech complex over `V`.**  The evaluated
Čech augmentation `G_V(Ψ(cechAugmentation))` (the restriction-product map `Γ(V, F) → ∏_i
Γ(U_i ∩ V, F)`) transported across the degree-`0` object iso `coreIso_objIso`.  This is the
shared augmentation node `D'_aug = (sectionCechComplexV …).augment ε hε` used by BOTH
`cechSection_complex_iso` (`D ≅ D'_aug`) and `cechSection_contractible`
(`Homotopy (𝟙 D'_aug) 0`), so the consumer glue `isZero_homology_of_iso_homotopy_id_zero`
matches their `D'`.  (The scaffold previously took `ε` as a free parameter, which makes both
lemmas false for a non-canonical `ε`; the consumer `hSec` calls them with no `ε`.) -/
noncomputable def sectionCechAugV (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) [Finite 𝒰.I₀] (F : X.Modules)
    (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens X) :
    ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).obj F).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op V) ⟶
      (sectionCechComplexV 𝒰 F V).X 0 :=
  (PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf X.ringCatSheaf.obj ⋙
      (evaluation (TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X)ᵒᵖ AddCommGrpCat).obj (Opposite.op V)).map
    ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf ⋙
      PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars (𝟙 X.ringCatSheaf.obj)).map (cechAugmentation 𝒰 F)) ≫
    (coreIso_objIso 𝒰 F 0 V).hom

/-- **Per-coface square of the core comparison** (`lem:coreIso_comm_coface`): for each

          (Opposite.op (⨅ l, (coverOpen 𝒰 (τ l) ⊓ V)))) σ =
